title: [CI:DOCS] Github-workflow: Report both failures and errors.
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Port of changes from https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12997 and
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13005 to the workflow in this
repository.

#### How to verify it

Impractical to automatically verify, other than stare at it and wonder how it ever worked :rofl: 
TBH, I was able to test/confirm these changes via a similar PR in another repository:
https://github.com/containers/automation_images/runs/4940937282?check_suite_focus=true
(i.e. it correctly sent an error-notice e-mail due to an unrelated/soon-to-be-fixed problem)

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

comments.body: woopsie...hold up a sec, there's a syntax error I thought I fixed (but obviously didn't)...
...okay, fixed and rebased.  This PR was missing fix in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13005

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [cevich,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
